title: Year validation (0–2100) added beyond spec
evidence: app.py:81-87 validates year range and integer type on create; app.py:157-163 on update
suggestion: None — reasonable input hardening; note as enhancement, not a deduction

title: ?author= filter uses substring LIKE match rather than exact equality
evidence: app.py:108-111 'SELECT * FROM books WHERE author LIKE ?' with (f'%{author}%',)
suggestion: Acceptable interpretation of the spec; document the substring semantics in README if exact-match is ever expected

title: init_db() only runs under __main__, so a WSGI/gunicorn deployment never creates the table
evidence: app.py:190-192 calls init_db() only inside `if __name__ == '__main__'`; get_db() (app.py:10) does not ensure schema exists
suggestion: Call init_db() (or ensure-schema) at import/app-factory time so non-`python app.py` deployments work
